title: 7 Herbal Teas to Ease Endometriosis Pain for Dancers
description: Vitex agnus-castus teas have been traditionally used to help manage endometriosis pain, and research suggests that it may be effective in reducing symptoms. The tea contains a compound called agnuside, which is believed to work by regulating hormonal imbalances, particularly estrogen levels, that can contribute to endometriosis pain. It also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce inflammation and oxidative...
